source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
 
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(250), r.CaseUniqueId) AS AppealRefNumber,
 
    r.CaseReference,
 
	r.CaseNodeId,
 
    ll1.ValStr AS TypeOfInvolvement,
 
    ll2.ValStr AS InspectorName,
 
    ll3.ValStr AS ContactID,
 
    ll1.ParentKeyID,
 
    P.PostName,
 
    P.FirstName,
 
    P.LastName,
 
    P.Email
 
FROM dbo.DTree AS d
 
INNER JOIN dbo.Horizon_CaseReference AS r
 
    ON d.DataID = r.CaseNodeId
 
INNER JOIN dbo.LLAttrData AS ll1
 
    ON d.DataID = ll1.ID
 
INNER JOIN dbo.LLAttrData AS ll2
 
    ON d.DataID = ll2.ID
 
   AND ll1.ParentKeyID = ll2.ParentKeyID
 
INNER JOIN dbo.LLAttrData AS ll3
 
    ON d.DataID = ll3.ID
 
   AND ll2.ParentKeyID = ll3.ParentKeyID
 
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.Contacts_Person AS P
 
    ON ll3.ValStr = 'P_' + CAST(P.P_ID AS VARCHAR(10))
 
WHERE ll1.DefID = 95501
 
  AND ll1.AttrID = 3
 
  AND ll1.EntryNum = 1
 
  AND ll2.DefID = 95501
 
  AND ll2.AttrID = 19
 
  AND ll2.EntryNum = 1
 
  AND ll3.DefID = 95501
 
  AND ll3.AttrID = 20
 
  AND ll3.EntryNum = 1
 
  AND ll1.ValStr LIKE '%Inspector%'
 
  AND r.CaseReference LIKE '%ROW%'
